title: Magex's Neko Totem
description: Changes the Totem of Undying into the lovely Maneki Neko!
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b97eb8291e662983d9204f1c29d56c468afd406.png)
# About
This resource pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with a charming **Maneki Neko** (Lucky Cat). Instead of holding the usual totem, you’ll carry a cute, beckoning cat that brings fortune and keeps you alive **in style**.

Perfect for players who love cozy, aesthetic vibes—or anyone who could use a little extra luck on their adventures!


# Features
- Adds a model of the Totem of Undying
- Changes the texture of the Totem of Undying
